heading: Contributions of meals and refreshments during emergency duty
label: 1971 Contributions of meals and refreshments during emergency duty
text: At any time on or after , the United States Capitol Police may accept contributions of meals and refreshments in support of activities of the United States Capitol Police during a period of emergency (as determined by the Capitol Police Board).November 12, 2001
notes: CodificationSection was classified to section 206d of former Title 40, prior to the enactment of Title 40, Public Buildings, Property, and Works, by , , .Pub. L. 107–217, § 1116 Stat. 1062Aug. 21, 2002
